case_title: ROBERT T. JOHNSON VS. FIRESIDE BANK

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY JOHNSON, ROBERT T. AS TO DEFENDANT FIRESIDE BANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-22-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, ROBERT T. AS TO DEFENDANT FIRESIDE BANK
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-24-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FIRESIDE BANK
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-22-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-22-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING IS REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-22-2011 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, ROBERT T. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FIRESIDE BANK STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
